title: Multi-task learning for quadruped robots via diffusion distillation
abstract: These instructions give you guidelines for preparing papers for IEEE Transactions and Journals. Use this document as a sample output. Paper titles should be written in uppercase and lowercase letters, not all uppercase. Avoid writing long formulas with subscripts in the title; short formulas that identify the elements are fine (e.g., ”Nd?Fe?B”). Full names of authors are preferred in the author field, but are not required. Put a space between authors initials. Define all symbols used in the abstract. Do not cite references in the abstract. Do not delete the blank line immediately above the abstract; it sets the footnote at the bottom of this column.
